title: Bronze Award - Blockchain Olympiad Bangladesh 2025
description: Recognized with the Bronze Award at Blockchain Olympiad Bangladesh 2025 for designing and presenting an innovative Self-Sovereign Identity (SSI)-based Unified Identity System. The solution leveraged blockchain technology to provide decentralized, secure, and user-controlled digital identities, enabling privacy-preserving authentication, verifiable credentials, and seamless access to public and private services. The project addressed challenges related to identity fragmentation, data security, and trust in digital ecosystems.
